New Post
Create a new research article. It will be published automatically after submit.
Post Metadata
URL: crestmoreresearch.com/research/…
Press Enter or comma to add a tag
Featured Image
🖼️
Drag & drop or click to upload
Recommended: 1200×630 JPG/PNG · Used as hero image + OG preview
Article Body (Markdown)
Additional Images (for use in article body)
📎
Upload images to use in the article
After uploading, copy the path shown and paste into markdown: ![alt text](/images/filename)
Schema Markup (JSON-LD) ▼ Preview

Article schema is auto-generated from your metadata above. Optionally add extra schema types below.

Deploy Status

          
After publishing a post, GitHub Actions automatically rebuilds the site. It typically takes 2–3 minutes to go live.
